moments.title: Wimbledon enters its thrilling second week
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with the world's best tennis players battling it out on the grass courts of the All England Club until July 12th.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Wimbledon's second week is here! Who are you backing for the singles titles as the competition heats up on the grass courts?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: As Wimbledon enters its crucial second week, can any of the British contingent make a deep run to the finals? Fingers crossed!

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world are on SW19! London is buzzing as Wimbledon's second week promises unmissable action.

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 kicks off in Barcelona
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins today, July 4th, with the Grand Départ in Barcelona, Spain, before three weeks of gruelling cycling action.

angles.name: Opening Stage
angles.copy: And they're off! The 2026 Tour de France has begun in Barcelona. Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey this year?

angles.name: Global Event
angles.copy: Cycling fans, assemble! The iconic Tour de France is underway, bringing three weeks of incredible sporting drama. Where are you watching from?

moments.title: UK braces for week-long heatwave
moments.blurb: A week-long heatwave is forecast for parts of the UK, with temperatures expected to peak at 34C in the South East by late next week, and yellow heat health alerts in place across much of England until July 11th.

angles.name: Heatwave Starts
angles.copy: Here we go again! A week-long heatwave is kicking off across parts of the UK, with temperatures climbing. Stay hydrated and stay safe!

angles.name: South East Hotspot
angles.copy: The South East is set to bake next week with temperatures potentially hitting 34C! How are you keeping cool in the heat?

angles.name: Health Alert
angles.copy: Yellow heat health alerts are in place across England for the next week. Remember to check on vulnerable friends and family.

moments.title: Love Island UK continues nightly drama
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, is airing nightly on ITV2 and ITVX (except Saturdays for 'Unseen Bits'), with the islanders navigating new couplings and villa drama.

angles.name: Daily Update
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's your favourite couple in the villa right now? Tune in at 9pm on ITV2/ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Talk
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up faster than the UK weather! What's been the biggest shocker of the week so far?

moments.title: Wonderland Festival lights up Nottinghamshire
moments.blurb: Wonderland Festival is live this weekend, July 4-5, at Newstead Abbey, Nottinghamshire, featuring dance music acts like Annie Mac, Sam Divine, and Craig Charles.

angles.name: Live Today
angles.copy: Wonderland Festival is happening right now at Newstead Abbey! Annie Mac, Sam Divine and more bringing the vibes. Who's there?

angles.name: Weekend Festival
angles.copy: Nottinghamshire is bouncing this weekend with Wonderland Festival! If you're into house, disco and electronic beats, this is the place to be.

moments.title: Lytham Festival 2026 concludes this weekend
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, which kicked off on July 1st, wraps up this weekend, July 4-5, on Lytham Green, with a lineup featuring big names across pop and rock.

angles.name: Festival Finale
angles.copy: It's the final weekend for Lytham Festival 2026! Who caught the incredible acts on Lytham Green? What was your highlight?

angles.name: Last Chance
angles.copy: If you're near Lytham, it's your last chance to catch Lytham Festival today and tomorrow! Don't miss out on the music.

moments.title: Summer holidays begin for Scottish and NI schools
moments.blurb: Schools in Scotland and Northern Ireland have officially begun their summer holidays this week, with pupils now enjoying their break.

angles.name: Holidays Start
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Scotland and Northern Ireland! Wishing all students a fantastic, well-deserved break.

angles.name: Travel Time
angles.copy: With Scottish and NI schools on summer holidays, travel plans are in full swing! Where are you heading for your summer getaway?

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles', celebrates his 31st birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Big Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone! What's your favourite Posty track?

angles.name: Music Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st today! From 'White Iverson' to his latest, he keeps delivering the hits.

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday to John Waite
moments.blurb: English singer-songwriter John Waite, famous for 'Missing You' and his work with The Babys and Bad English, turns 74 today.

angles.name: Birthday Classic
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary John Waite! 'Missing You' is still an absolute anthem.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: From The Babys to Bad English and a stellar solo career, Happy Birthday to John Waite, 74 today!

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday to Melanie Fiona
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B singer Melanie Fiona, a two-time Grammy winner known for 'Fool for You' and 'It Kills Me', celebrates her 43rd birthday today.

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: Sending Happy 43rd Birthday wishes to the incredible Melanie Fiona! Her soulful voice is timeless.

angles.name: Grammy Winner
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Grammy-winning artist Melanie Fiona, 43 today! What's your top track from her?

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday to BBMak's Stephen McNally
moments.blurb: Stephen McNally, who put the 'Mak' in the popular 90s/00s boyband BBMak, celebrates his 48th birthday today.

angles.name: Boyband Throwback
angles.copy: Remember BBMak? Happy 48th Birthday to Stephen McNally! What's your favourite BBMak hit?

angles.name: Liverpool Legend
angles.copy: From Liverpool to pop stardom, Happy Birthday to Stephen McNally, 48 today!

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday to INXS' Kirk Pengilly
moments.blurb: Kirk Pengilly, guitarist and saxophonist for the iconic Australian rock band INXS, turns 68 today.

angles.name: INXS Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 68th Birthday to INXS's Kirk Pengilly! Rock on!

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: From 'Need You Tonight' to 'Never Tear Us Apart', Kirk Pengilly helped define a sound. Happy Birthday to the INXS legend!

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday to Earth, Wind & Fire's Ralph Johnson
moments.blurb: Ralph Johnson, percussionist and vocalist for the legendary band Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Icon
angles.copy: Give it up for Ralph Johnson of Earth, Wind & Fire, who turns 75 today! What's your favourite EWF track?

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Ralph Johnson's 75th Birthday! His contributions to Earth, Wind & Fire are legendary.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86 on Sunday
moments.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, legendary drummer for The Beatles, will celebrate his 86th birthday on Sunday, July 7th.

angles.name: Upcoming Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to wish a very Happy 86th Birthday to a true music icon, Ringo Starr, this Sunday!

angles.name: Legendary Drummer
angles.copy: On Sunday, Ringo Starr celebrates 86 years! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday on Tuesday
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of the band Hole, will celebrate her 62nd birthday on Tuesday, July 9th.

angles.name: Punk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: On Tuesday, the formidable Courtney Love turns 62! What's your favourite Hole song or Courtney moment?

angles.name: 90s Alternative
angles.copy: Ahead of her 62nd Birthday on Tuesday, we're celebrating the enduring influence of Courtney Love and Hole.

moments.title: Jack White turns 51 on Tuesday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, and producer Jack White, best known for his work with The White Stripes, will celebrate his 51st birthday on Tuesday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Genius
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday loading for Jack White on Tuesday! What's your go-to White Stripes track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: From 'Seven Nation Army' to his solo work, Jack White continues to innovate. He turns 51 on Tuesday!

moments.title: The Open Championship practice days begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale will see practice days commence from Sunday, July 12th, with the main tournament starting on July 16th.

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for The Open! Practice days kick off at Royal Birkdale on Sunday. Who are you hoping to see lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale for The Open practice days starting Sunday. Golf season is in full swing!

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67 on Thursday
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the iconic guitarist and songwriter for rock legends Bon Jovi, will celebrate his 67th birthday on Thursday, July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Richie Sambora a very Happy 67th Birthday on Thursday! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar riff?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: From 'Livin' on a Prayer' to 'Wanted Dead or Alive', Richie Sambora's guitar work is legendary. He turns 67 this Thursday!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday on Thursday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her distinctive voice and hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', will celebrate her 67th birthday on Thursday, July 11th.

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega on Thursday! 'Luka' still gives us chills.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Ahead of her 67th Birthday this Thursday, we're celebrating Suzanne Vega's enduring artistry. What's your favourite track?
